targets.name: claude
post_switch_verifier: import json; from pathlib import Path; m=json.loads(Path('runtime-manifest.json').read_text()); assert len(m['command_adapters']) == 12; assert all(Path(x['path']).is_file() for x in m['command_adapters']); assert all((Path('skills') / x['alias'] / 'SKILL.md').is_file() for x in m['command_aliases'])

targets.name: codex
post_switch_verifier: import json; from pathlib import Path; m=json.loads(Path('runtime-manifest.json').read_text()); assert len(m['command_adapters']) == 12; assert all(Path(x['path']).is_file() for x in m['command_adapters']); assert all((Path('skills') / x['alias'] / 'SKILL.md').is_file() for x in m['command_aliases'])
